query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_books,
  SUM(CASE WHEN authorName IS NULL OR authorName = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_author,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IN ('not-found','skipped','') OR coverImageUrl IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as bad_cover,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl LIKE '%_UY218_%' OR coverImageUrl LIKE '%_UL320_%' OR coverImageUrl LIKE '%_UY320_%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as low_res_amazon,
  SUM(CASE WHEN summary IS NULL OR summary = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_summary,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3CoverUrl IS NULL OR s3CoverUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_s3,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3CoverUrl LIKE 'https://%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_s3_cover
FROM book_profiles;
